artifacts.summary: Audit of docs/installation.md NixOS references to remove, eight dependencies (Xcode CLT, Homebrew, Node.js, Zed, Claude Code, claude-acp bridge, SuperDoc, openpyxl) with detection/install/verify commands, recommended section order, and a uniform per-section template.

summary: Research complete. Identified NixOS references in docs/installation.md lines 3, 137-154, and broken inbound link in docs/agent-system/zed-agent-panel.md:58. Catalogued 8 dependencies with detection commands and authoritative sources. Flagged that current brew formula for Claude Code is outdated (should be 'brew install --cask claude-code') and that Node.js must be added as an explicit dependency because MCP tools use npx.
